title: Zambia Income Tax Return for Individuals (Self-Assessment Form, ITF 46_1 V001)
description: The Zambia Revenue Authority's (ZRA) Direct Taxes Division "Income Tax Return for Individuals — Self-Assessment Form" (ITF 46_1 V001), used by an individual taxpayer to declare rental income, employment income, and a statement of financial position (balance sheet) for an income tax charge year, and to make the accompanying signed declaration. Opens Zambia's Taxes vertical (3 of 6 — Business Formation and Passport already published via zm/pacra/company-incorporation and zm/dnrpc/passport-application). This schema models Taxpayer Details (page 1, always required); Part 1 Rental Income's directly-supplied income/withholding-tax lines; Section B's Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet) directly-supplied lines; Section F Employment Income for up to two employers; Section G Interest in Companies (related-party transactions); and Section H's Declaration. The form's own business/self-employment income computation (Section A Summary, Section C Statement of Comprehensive Income, Section D Computation of Chargeable Income from Business per source, Schedules 1-4 (Capital Allowances; income of other persons; current-year and prior-year losses), and Section E Details of Share of Profit from Partnership Firm(s)) is out of scope for v1.0.0 — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full disclosed scoping rationale. This schema does not file the return itself; the live source is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Republic of Zambia or the Zambia Revenue Authority.

source.documentRef: "Income Tax Return for Individuals — Self-Assessment Form" (ITF 46_1 V001), Zambia Revenue Authority, Direct Taxes Division, 19 pages, native (searchable-text) PDF, marked "FOR GUIDANCE ONLY" / "THIS MANUAL RETURN ... SHOULD NOT BE SUBMITTED TO ZAMBIA REVENUE AUTHORITY".

verification.notes:
## Candidate selection

GOV-4287 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). The GOV-4271 cycle (opening Zambia
as the registry's 77th jurisdiction via `zm/pacra/company-incorporation@1.0.0`,
Business Formation) pre-scouted and banked Zambia's Taxes candidate as
disclosed, STRONG open backlog: a Zambia Revenue Authority (ZRA) PDF,
`Income-Tax-Return-for-Individuals.pdf` (Form ITF 46_1 V001), left unauthored
at the time in favor of the smaller-scope Passport candidate (subsequently
authored in GOV-4278). This cycle authors that banked candidate, opening
Zambia's Taxes vertical (3 of 6). The GOV-4271 cycle's own banked URL
(`.../2023/06/Income-Tax-Return-for-Individuals.pdf`) now 404s; this cycle's
issue corrected it to a currently-live `.../2020/06/...` path, confirmed
directly (see below).

## Reaching the live source

Fetched
`https://www.zra.org.zm/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/Income-Tax-Return-for-Individuals.pdf`
directly:

- HTTP 200, `Content-Type: application/pdf`, `Content-Length: 1078188` bytes,
  `Last-Modified: Sat, 02 Apr 2022 10:01:58 GMT`.
- No login, CAPTCHA, or WAF gate blocks reaching or reading this file —
  confirmed via a plain unauthenticated `curl` request with no session/cookie
  state (only a TLS certificate-verification bypass was needed to reach the
  host from this session's network egress; the certificate itself is not
  otherwise implicated in this finding).
- sha256 `fc1bde9aec0cac29b892acedb252ba1321bbd82e6e403380b1a9cd1498c58484`.
- PDF header `%PDF-1.5` at byte 0 — a genuine native (searchable-text) PDF,
  not a scanned image, confirmed by clean `pdfjs-dist` text-layer extraction
  across all pages.

## Extraction method

Extracted with `pdfjs-dist` (vendored from an existing session scratch
install at `/tmp/node_modules`, CommonJS build at
`legacy/build/pdf.js` since this vendored copy ships no ESM entry point),
reading each text item's raw string and its `transform` x/y position across
all 19 pages. Separately rendered pages 1-4, 15, 16, and 17 to PNGs at 2x
scale via `node-canvas` (`/tmp/node_modules/canvas`) to visually confirm true
table/column layout and, specifically, which cells the source document
itself shades grey — every grey-shaded cell corresponds one-to-one with a
formula/total line identified independently from the text-position
extraction (e.g. Section B's "Total Fixed Assets", "Total Investments" rows),
cross-corroborating the computed-vs-directly-supplied line classification
this schema's scoping relies on. (Embedded-font glyph outlines did not fully
rasterize in this environment — `getPathGenerator` "object that isn't
resolved yet" warnings — so the rendered PNGs are only used to confirm ruled
table/shading structure, not as a substitute for the clean text-layer
extraction, which read every field label correctly.)

## Document structure

The 19-page form (each page footer-stamped "ITF 46_1 V001") is a combined
individual income tax return covering, in order: page 1, Taxpayer Details;
page 2, Part 1 Rental Income and the start of Part 2 (Section A Summary Tax
Payable, Section B Statement of Financial Position); pages 3-4, Section B
continued; pages 5-11, Section C (Statement of Comprehensive Income) and
Section D (Computation of Chargeable Income from Business, repeated for up
to 3 income sources plus continuation sheets); pages 12-13, Schedule 1
(Capital Allowances, Parts I-IV); pages 13-14, Schedule 2 (income of other
persons), Schedule 3 (current-year losses), Schedule 4 (prior-year losses);
pages 14-15, Section E (Details of Share of Profit from Partnership Firms,
a/b); pages 15-16, Section F (Employment Income, Employer 1 and Employer 2);
page 16, Section G (Interest in Companies); page 17, Section H (Declaration);
pages 17-18, filing-instructions notes (not applicant-supplied data); page
19, a disclaimer stating the PDF itself is "FOR GUIDANCE ONLY" and "SHOULD
NOT BE SUBMITTED TO ZAMBIA REVENUE AUTHORITY" (i.e. the live, submittable
return is filed through a separate system/process; this PDF is ZRA's own
published reference copy of the form's field layout, the standard sourcing
basis this registry uses for forms of this kind).

## Scope

This schema models 4 of the form's own printed sections/schedules in full —
Taxpayer Details, Part 1 Rental Income, Section B Balance Sheet, Section F
Employment Income — plus Section G and Section H, and excludes the business/
self-employment income computation entirely (Section A, Section C, Section
D, Schedules 1-4, Section E), per the issue's own scope guidance to follow
this registry's narrow-scoping precedent (e.g. Latvia's own D3/D3¹/GD
exclusions) rather than force-fit a 19-page, multi-schedule form into one
v1.0.0 document. The excluded sections are a coherent, separable unit — a
Zambian taxpayer with only rental and/or employment income (this schema's
scope) never touches them — and are disclosed here as the natural follow-on
companion-schema candidate for a future PATCH/minor, not silently dropped.

Within the sections this schema does cover, every printed formula/subtotal
line (e.g. Section B's "Total Fixed Assets (a+b+c+d+e+f+g)", "Net Book Value
... (h-i)"; Section F's "TOTAL TAXABLE INCOME FROM EMPLOYMENT [1+2+3+4-5-6-7]",
"Tax on employment income Before Tax Credit", "Net Tax from Employment
[9-10]") is excluded from `fields[]`, per this registry's standing closed
decision to defer calculated/derived fields (GSP-0013 §7, "Calculated /
derived fields — recommend deferring", founder-confirmed on GOV-302) — only
the lines a taxpayer directly supplies are modelled. Each excluded line's
own field description cites the formula it would have computed, so the gap
is visible rather than silent.

Models 107 `fields[]` across 6 steps (Taxpayer Details; Part 1 Rental Income;
Section B Statement of Financial Position; Section F Employment Income;
Section G Interest in Companies; Section H Declaration). No `edition` axis
is used (unlike, e.g., `us/irs/individual-income-tax-return-1040`'s
per-tax-year editions): this form's own "Charge Year" is a single blank the
filer fills in on a single, undated generic template (matching this
registry's existing `kz/kgd/*`/`ua/dps/*` tax-return precedent, which model
the filing year as an ordinary data field rather than a schema edition).

## Disclosed findings and interpretation choices

1. **`middleName` is modelled `required: false`** despite page 1's own
   blanket note, "All fields on page 1 are mandatory," since a substantial
   share of individual taxpayers have no middle name and the form provides
   no "N/A" convention to otherwise satisfy a hard requirement.
2. **Sr No 3-6 (Postal Address, Physical Address, E-mail Address,
   Telephone/Cell Number) are modelled `required: false`**, per that same
   table's own qualifying sub-heading, "Taxpayer Details (only fill in 3 to
   6 if there has been any changes)" — a more specific, narrower rule than
   the page's blanket mandatory note, and the one this schema follows for
   these four items specifically.
3. **`priorReturnAcknowledgementReceiptNumber` is a disclosed addition with
   no printed label on page 1 itself.** Page 1 prints only "Original/Amended"
   tick boxes, "Reason for amendment", and "Attachments if any" — no visible
   box for an acknowledgement receipt number. Page 18's own filing
   instructions state "If you had submitted an original return earlier
   please enter the acknowledgement receipt number issued to you in the
   space provided at item 2 on the first page of the return," establishing
   that such a value belongs somewhere on page 1 for an amended return even
   though no printed label accompanies it there. Modelled `requiredWhen
   isAmendedReturn` rather than silently dropped.
4. **`attachmentsIfAny` collapses the form's two blank numbered lines ("1."
   / "2.") into one free-text field**, since neither line carries its own
   distinct label.
5. **Employer 2's fields carry no eligibility gate** (e.g. no fabricated
   `hasSecondEmployer` boolean): the form prints Employer 1 and Employer 2 as
   two structurally identical, unconditional blocks with no printed count or
   yes/no signal distinguishing "one employer" from "two employers" — the
   same disclosed no-printed-signal treatment this registry's
   `et/ics/passport-application` and this schema's own Tax-Agent fields (finding
   6) use for their own analogous ungated optional fields. Both employer
   blocks are therefore bare-optional at the field level.
6. **The Tax Agent block (`taxAgentFullName`/`taxAgentSignature`/
   `taxAgentCapacity`) is bare-optional**, since the form prints no checkbox
   distinguishing a self-filed return from an agent-prepared one.
7. **Section G's second related-party slot
   (`relatedParty2BusinessName`/`Tpin`/`SharesInterestControlled`) is
   bare-optional even when `hasRelatedPartyTransactions` is true** — the
   source prints exactly two blank table rows with no numbering or count
   field, so only the first slot is `requiredWhen hasRelatedPartyTransactions`
   equals `true`; a filer with only one related-party transaction leaves the
   second slot empty.
8. **`profitLossForYear` (Section B, line 7.f) is the only balance-sheet
   money field modelled without a `minimum: 0` constraint**, since it is
   explicitly a profit-or-loss figure and may be negative; every other
   balance-sheet line is a plain asset/liability/reserve amount constrained
   to `minimum: 0`.
9. **The Zambia Revenue Authority's own published copy of this form is
   watermarked "FOR GUIDANCE ONLY" and its final page states "THIS MANUAL
   RETURN IS MEANT FOR GUIDANCE ONLY AND THEREFORE IT SHOULD NOT BE
   SUBMITTED TO ZAMBIA REVENUE AUTHORITY."** This is disclosed as a
   sourcing characteristic, not a defect: it is ZRA's own live, currently
   published reference copy of the return's field layout (the standard
   sourcing basis this registry uses), and the live submission channel
   (ZRA's e-filing portal or in-person office submission per page 18's own
   "Filing Requirements" note) is a separate process this schema does not
   model or claim to be.
10. **Excluded as official-use-only fields, not applicant-supplied data:**
    page 1's "FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY" block (Officer's Name/Signature/Date
    Received, Receiving Office Date Stamp).

## Conformance

3 valid mock scenarios — `valid-rental-income-only` (an individual with only
Part 1 rental income and a signed declaration, no balance sheet, employment,
or related-party data populated); `valid-employment-and-balance-sheet` (an
individual with a full Section B balance sheet and two Section F employers
populated, exercising every balance-sheet and both employer field blocks);
and `valid-amended-return-with-related-party` (an amended return exercising
`isAmendedReturn`'s two `requiredWhen` fields and `hasRelatedPartyTransactions`'s
first related-party slot) — plus 10 mutation-control fixtures (one missing
statically-required field from each of `tpin`, `foreName`, `lastName`,
`accountingPeriod`, `isAmendedReturn`, `hasRelatedPartyTransactions`,
`taxpayerFullName`, `taxpayerDeclarationSignature` — 8 fixtures; one
missing-required fixture for a `requiredWhen`-gated field —
`amendmentReason` — correctly triggered in its own scenario; and an
unknown-field-rejected fixture) are committed under
`conformance/zm/zra/individual-income-tax-return/1.0.0/`.

An ephemeral, from-scratch conformance checker (deriving required/
requiredWhen rules directly from this schema's own `fields[]`, discarded
after use, not committed) ran all 13 fixtures: all 3 valid scenarios at 0
errors, all 10 mutation controls each raising exactly 1 error, and confirmed
every `requiredWhen` field reference resolves to a real field name (0
dangling references). Validated clean with `node tools/validate.mjs` and
`node tools/validate-ajv.mjs`, individually and as part of the full registry
run.

steps.title: Section B: Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet)

fields.name: chargeYear
fields.label: Income Tax Charge Year (ended 31st December)
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, header — "Income Tax Charge Year ended 31st December……...................."

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: Printed as a plain blank cell under "Name of Taxpayer" with no delete-non-applicable option list (unlike this registry's zm/dnrpc/passport-application, whose equivalent field prints "(Dr/Mr/Mrs/Miss)"), so modelled as free string rather than enum.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 2, Name of Taxpayer — "Title"

fields.name: foreName
fields.label: Fore name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 2, Name of Taxpayer — "Fore Name"

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Page 1's own note states "All fields on page 1 are mandatory", which literally would include this field, but it is modelled `required: false` here as a disclosed narrow exception since a substantial share of individual taxpayers have no middle name and the form gives no "N/A" convention to satisfy a hard requirement.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 2, Name of Taxpayer — "Middle Name"

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 2, Name of Taxpayer — "Last Name"

fields.name: postalPoBox
fields.label: Postal address — P.O. Box
fields.description: Sr No 3-6 (Postal Address, Physical Address, E-mail Address, Telephone/Cell Number) sit under the table's own sub-heading "Taxpayer Details (only fill in 3 to 6 if there has been any changes)", directly qualifying the page's blanket "All fields on page 1 are mandatory" note for these four items specifically — modelled `required: false` for Sr No 3-6, reflecting that sub-heading rather than the page-level note.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 3, Postal Address — "PO Box"

fields.name: physicalPlotHouseNo
fields.label: Physical address — Plot / House No
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 4, Physical Address — "Plot / House No"

fields.name: telephoneCountryCode
fields.label: Telephone / Cell number — Country Code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 6, Telephone/Cell Number — "Country Code"

fields.name: telephoneAreaCode
fields.label: Telephone / Cell number — Area Code
fields.sourceRef: Page 1, Sr No 6, Telephone/Cell Number — "Area Code"

fields.name: isAmendedReturn
fields.label: This is an amended return (not an original return)
fields.description: Printed as two tick boxes, "Original" / "Amended (Tick as applicable)", modelled as a single boolean where true means "Amended" was ticked.

fields.name: priorReturnAcknowledgementReceiptNumber
fields.label: Acknowledgement receipt number of the original return being amended
fields.description: Disclosed finding: page 1 itself prints no explicit labelled box for this value — only "Original/Amended" tick boxes, "Reason for amendment", and "Attachments if any" appear. Page 18's own filing instructions state "If you had submitted an original return earlier please enter the acknowledgement receipt number issued to you in the space provided at item 2 on the first page of the return", directly establishing that such a value belongs on page 1 for an amended return even though no printed label accompanies it there. Modelled here as a disclosed interpretation choice rather than silently dropped.
fields.sourceRef: Page 18, Filing Status instruction 2 (referencing an unlabelled space on page 1)

fields.name: attachmentsIfAny
fields.label: Attachments (if any)
fields.description: Printed as "Attachments if any" followed by two blank numbered lines ("1." / "2."); modelled as a single free-text field for listing attached document names rather than two separate slots, since the form prints no distinct label differentiating line 1 from line 2.

fields.name: individualRentalIncomeAmount
fields.label: Individual rental income — annual rental income
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Part 1 Rental Income, line 1 — "Individual Rental Income" (Annual Rental Income column)

fields.name: individualRentalIncomeWithholdingTax
fields.label: Withholding Tax suffered on individual rental income
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Part 1 Rental Income, line 2 — "Less Withholding Tax suffered on individual rental income"

fields.name: partnershipRentalIncomeShareAmount
fields.label: Share of rental income from partnership firm
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Part 1 Rental Income, line 4 — "Share of rental income from partnership firm" (Annual Rental Income column)

fields.name: partnershipRentalIncomeShareWithholdingTax
fields.label: Withholding Tax from partnership firm suffered on rental income
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Part 1 Rental Income, line 5 — "Less share of withholding Tax from partnership firm suffered on rental income"

fields.name: balanceSheetAsOfDate
fields.label: Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet) as at
fields.sourceRef: Page 2, Section B header — "Statement of Financial Position (Balance Sheet) as at ___________"

fields.name: fixedAssetsCapitalWorksInProgress
fields.label: Fixed assets — Capital works in Progress

fields.name: fixedAssetsAccumulatedDepreciation
fields.label: Fixed assets — Accumulated Depreciation / Amortization
fields.description: Line 1.h ("Total Fixed Assets", a+b+c+d+e+f+g) and line 1.j ("Net Book Value of Fixed Assets", h-i) are both formula totals of other lines on this schedule and are excluded from this schema per the registry's standing closed decision to defer calculated/derived fields (GSP-0013 §7 / GOV-302 founder ruling) — only this line's own directly-supplied accumulated-depreciation figure is modelled.

fields.name: investmentsOther
fields.label: Investments — Other Investments
fields.description: Line 2.f ("Total Investments", a+b+c+d+e) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: inventoryOthers
fields.label: Current assets — Inventories — Others
fields.description: Line 3.a.i.c ("Total Inventory", a+b) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: receivablesTradeReceivablesDebtorsLoans
fields.label: Current assets — Trade Receivables / Debtors / Loans

fields.name: receivablesOtherReceivablesDebtorsLoans
fields.label: Current assets — Other Receivables / Debtors / Loans
fields.description: Line 3.a.ii.d ("Total Receivables/Debtors", a+b+c) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: cashInHandAndEquivalents
fields.label: Current assets — Cash in hand and cash equivalents
fields.description: Line 3.a.iii.c ("Total balances available", a+b) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: otherCurrentAssets
fields.label: Current assets — Other Current Assets
fields.description: Line 3.a.v ("Total Current Assets") is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: loansToRelatedParties
fields.label: Loans and Advances — Loans to related Parties

fields.name: advancesToStaff
fields.label: Loans and Advances — Advances to Staff

fields.name: loansAndAdvancesToOthers
fields.label: Loans and Advances — Loans and Advances to Others
fields.description: Line 3.b.iv ("Total of Loans and Advances") and line 3.c ("Total Current Assets, Loans and Advances") are both formula totals, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: payablesOtherCurrentLiabilities
fields.label: Current liabilities — Other Current liabilities
fields.description: Line 4.d.i.c ("Total current liabilities", a+b) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: otherProvisions
fields.label: Provisions — Other Provisions
fields.description: Line 4.d.ii.d ("Total Provisions", a+b+c), line 4.d.iii ("Total Current Liabilities and Provisions"), line 5 ("Net Current Assets"), and line 6 ("Total Assets") are all formula totals, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: otherReserves
fields.label: Sources of Funds — Any other Reserves

fields.name: profitLossForYear
fields.label: Sources of Funds — Profit/Loss for Year
fields.description: Modelled without a `minimum` constraint, unlike the other balance-sheet lines, since this line is explicitly a profit-OR-loss figure and may be negative.

fields.name: lessDrawings
fields.label: Sources of Funds — Less Drawings
fields.description: Line 7.h ("Total Proprietor's Capital and Reserves", a+b+c+d+e+f-g) is a formula total, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: loanFromFinancialInstitutions
fields.label: Long Term Liabilities — Loan from Financial Institutions

fields.name: payablesCreditorsMoreThanOneYear
fields.label: Long Term Liabilities — Payables/Creditors for more than one year

fields.name: dueToRelatedParties
fields.label: Long Term Liabilities — Due to related Parties
fields.description: Line 8.a.v ("Total Secured Liabilities") and line 9 ("Proprietors Funds and Long Term Liabilities") are both formula totals, excluded per GSP-0013 §7.

fields.name: employer1Tpin
fields.label: Employer 1 — TPIN of Employer
fields.sourceRef: Page 15, Section F, Employer 1 header — "TPIN OF EMPLOYER"

fields.name: employer1Name
fields.label: Employer 1 — Name of Employer
fields.sourceRef: Page 15, Section F, Employer 1 header — "NAME OF EMPLOYER"

fields.name: employer1GrossPay
fields.label: Employer 1 — Gross Pay (Salaries, Wages, Bonuses, Allowances etc.)

fields.name: employer1OtherIncomeDescription
fields.label: Employer 1 — Other income from employment (specify)
fields.sourceRef: Page 15, Section F, Employer 1, line 4 — "Other Income from employment (Specify)…."

fields.name: employer1OtherIncomeAmount
fields.label: Employer 1 — Other income from employment — amount

fields.name: employer1DeductProfessionalSubscriptions
fields.label: Employer 1 — Deduct subscriptions to professional and technical associations

fields.name: employer1DeductApprovedDonations
fields.label: Employer 1 — Deduct donations to approved Public Benefit organizations
fields.description: Line 8 ("TOTAL TAXABLE INCOME FROM EMPLOYMENT", 1+2+3+4-5-6-7) and line 11 ("Net Tax from Employment", 9-10) are formula totals; line 9 ("Tax on employment income Before Tax Credit") is a rate-table computation. All three are excluded per GSP-0013 §7 — only this line's own directly-supplied donations figure is modelled.

fields.name: employer2Tpin
fields.label: Employer 2 — TPIN of Employer

fields.name: taxAgentFullName
fields.label: Full name of Tax Agent (if this return was prepared by one)
fields.description: The Tax Agent block ("Full Name of Tax Agent…. Signature…. Capacity….") carries no printed checkbox distinguishing a self-filed return from an agent-prepared one, so all three Tax Agent fields are modelled bare-optional, matching this registry's established no-printed-signal convention (e.g. et/ics/passport-application's own analogous ungated optional fields).
fields.sourceRef: Page 17, Section H — "Full Name of Tax Agent…………………………………………………."

fields.name: taxpayerFullName
fields.label: Full names of person making the return (in Block Letters)
fields.sourceRef: Page 17, Section H — "I (Full names in Block Letters) ……… declare that this return contains a full and true statement…"

fields.name: taxpayerDeclarationSignature
fields.label: Signature of person making the return
fields.description: The form's own disclaimer reads "THIS RETURN WILL NOT BE ACCEPTED UNLESS THE DECLARATION IS SIGNED", directly justifying this field's `required: true`.
fields.sourceRef: Page 17, Section H — "Signature of person making the return"

fields.name: taxpayerDeclarationDate
fields.label: Date of declaration
fields.sourceRef: Page 17, Section H — "Date" (beside the person-making-the-return signature)

fields.name: taxpayerDesignation
fields.label: Designation
fields.description: Printed alongside the declaration signature/date with no separate mandatory signal beyond the declaration disclaimer, which names only the signature itself as a hard requirement — modelled bare-optional, disclosed here.
